child_spec.name: iter_0004_island4_extend_alphas_low
child_spec.reasoning_summary: MINIROCKET broke through to 0.4468 with class_weight=None + finer alphas. Amplify: keep class_weight=None, extend alpha grid further into low-regularization regime to confirm we're at the right strength.
